hq_svc.action: Install the HQ-SVC experimental dependency set, restore HQ-SVC assets, set AUTOVOICE_HQSVC_FULL=1, and rerun the CUDA validation on hardware.
hq_svc.reason: HQ-SVC is experimental and disabled unless AUTOVOICE_HQSVC_FULL=1 and optional dependencies are present.

realtime_meanvc.action: Run scripts/prepare_meanvc_assets.py in the canonical autovoice-thor environment, set AUTOVOICE_MEANVC_FULL=1, then rerun scripts/validate_cuda_stack.sh --pipeline realtime_meanvc.
realtime_meanvc.reason: MeanVC performance is experimental and disabled unless AUTOVOICE_MEANVC_FULL=1 is set.
